findings.description: Critical: Railway buildCommand is ignored when using the DOCKERFILE builder. The plan relies on railway.toml [build] buildCommand to build the gen-eval wheel before the Docker build starts, but Railway documentation confirms this command only applies to the Nixpacks builder; for Dockerfile builds, only the Dockerfile itself is used. This will cause the Docker build to fail because 'dist/gen_eval-*.whl' will not be found in the build context.
findings.resolution: Adopt Approach 1 (Option A) for Railway: set the Railway service 'Root Directory' to '/' (repo root) in the dashboard, update railway.toml to set 'dockerfilePath' to 'agent-coordinator/Dockerfile', and use a multi-stage Dockerfile where the first stage copies 'packages/gen-eval' to build the wheel.

findings.description: The plan successfully addresses the Round 1 blocker regarding contradictory 'deny' blocks in wp-coordinator-migrate and the UV_FIND_LINKS vs tool.uv.sources conflict.

Nit: Task 4.3 removes the 'gen_eval' re-export from 'evaluation/__init__.py' but should also explicitly remove 'gen_eval' from the '__all__' list in that file to avoid linter warnings or runtime attribute errors.
findings.resolution: Update agent-coordinator/evaluation/__init__.py to remove 'gen_eval' from both the import and the __all__ list.

findings.description: The updated descriptor-discovery glob in Task 5.2 and verification grep in Task 5.C correctly handle the data relocation from D7.
